Custom-made furnaces

Learn more
Discover the difference with BMI
Since its inception, BMI has been at the forefront of designing and manufacturing industrial furnaces for heat treatment. With a specialized focus on industrial vacuum furnaces since the early 1980s, BMI caters to the essential heat and thermochemical treatments.
BMI goes beyond offering a standard range of furnaces. We design, implement, and manufacture custom-made furnaces to meet the specific requirements of various sectors, including aeronautics, automotive industries, medical sector, steel and equipment manufacturers, and heat treatment contractors.
Leveraging decades of expertise, BMI holds numerous patents and technical specifications, showcasing our commitment to innovation. Our advanced techniques, such as nitriding and low-pressure carburizing, combined with unique technical offerings like rotary volute and inflatable seals, set us apart in the industry.
Company profile
Our Products
BMI Fours offers a wide range of innovative and high-quality solutions based on decades of experience and technical expertise. Discover how our products can revolutionize your heat treatment processes.

Our Group
BMI Fours offers a wide range of innovative and high-quality solutions based on decades of experience and technical expertise. Discover how our products can revolutionize your heat treatment processes.
For almost 60 years MAHLER Industrial Furnaces has been a synonym for innovative furnace systems in outstanding quality. The range of products reaches nowadays from standard belt furnaces to highly specialized roller hearth furnaces and bogie hearth furnaces with highest demands on atmosphere quality and throughput.
IVA is specialized in engineering and manufacturing of energy efficient heat treatment equipment for almost every application purpose. The range of furnaces featuring economic efficiency and high cost-performance ratio, is offering solutions for multiple heat treatment processes.

products.text:
Vacuum Furnaces | BMI
Vacuum Heat Treatment Furnaces for Advanced Industrial Applications
As a leading manufacturer of
vacuum furnaces
, BMI specializes in the design and production of high-performance
vacuum heat treatment furnaces
for the most demanding industrial sectors. Our state-of-the-art equipment is engineered for the thermal processing of steel parts and metal components, delivering unmatched precision, reliability, and consistency.
Each
vacuum furnace
in our product range supports essential heat treatment processes, including vacuum hardening, gas or oil quenching, vacuum brazing, tempering, degassing, annealing, ageing, and stress relieving. These treatments ensure superior metallurgical results while preserving part integrity and surface cleanliness.
Advanced Thermochemical Treatments
BMI’s
vacuum heat treatment furnaces
can be equipped with advanced thermochemical treatment capabilities, such as low-pressure carburizing or nitriding, depending on specific customer needs. Learn more about these specialized applications by visiting our dedicated
Process Furnaces
section.
Turnkey Vacuum Furnace Solutions
With decades of expertise, BMI offers complete, turnkey
vacuum furnace systems
for industrial heat treatment lines. From initial consultation to installation and support, we are your trusted partner for tailored solutions in
vacuum thermal processing
A complete range of Vacuum Heat Treatment Furnaces
Gas cooling Vacuum Furnaces
Ideal for high-temperature industrial processes such as
vacuum hardening
vacuum brazing
, and
vacuum annealing
. These
vacuum furnaces
are available in multiple configurations (horizontal, vertical, and compact) making them perfect for both large-scale production and laboratory environments. Whether you're treating large parts or working with precision components, our
gas-cooled vacuum furnaces
deliver consistent thermal performance, optimized cooling rates, and exceptional surface quality.
Vacuum Brazing Furnace
Vacuum Gas Quenching Furnace
Compact Vacuum Furnace for Laboratories
Oil Quenching Vacuum Furnaces
Designed for vacuum oil quenching processes. Available in single- or dual-chamber designs, these
vacuum furnaces
provide high operational flexibility and are ideal for parts requiring rapid cooling under controlled vacuum conditions. Advanced features such as
low-pressure carburizing
can be integrated to further enhance performance and metallurgical results.
Horizontal Oil Quenching Furnace
Vertical Oil Quenching Furnace
Low-Temperature Vacuum Furnaces
BMI's
low-temperature heat treatment furnaces
are optimized for processes such as tempering, ageing, stress relieving, or aluminum brazing. These
vacuum furnaces
ensure precise thermal control and excellent temperature uniformity across all zones—critical for sensitive alloys and complex geometries operating within lower thermal ranges.
Tempering Furnace
Aluminum Brazing Furnace
Process furnaces for Advanced Thermochemical Treatments

process vacuum furna

Contact | BMI
Contact
You have a question? We are happy to help!
Please see the contact form given below in order to help us cater to your needs better and as quickly as possible. For your price requests, please refer to the request for quotation form and fill in the technical specifications of your heat treatment project and the basic characteristics of the vacuum furnace that might suit your requirements.
Fields with an asterisk (*) are mandatory.

Name *
Function *
Company *
Address *

Message
